description: S1 branch permutation validation — advertiser 37775, 2026-02-04 to 2026-02-10
method: Clickpass-only proxy query (fast, no event_log scan). Matches on redirect_ip = prior VV redirect_ip as proxy for bid_ip (~94% accurate). Confirms all 4 branches fire with correct row counts. s1_pv.pv_stage <= pv.pv_stage constraint validated.
note: s1_bid_ip and s1_vast_ip end-to-end validation COMPLETE — see ti_650_e2e_spotcheck_2026-02-07.json. 2-step spot check: find one example per branch (clickpass-only), then point-lookup el/il for those specific ad_served_ids. All 4 branches confirmed: el_bid_ip and il_bid_ip populated for every branch lookup target.

validated_permutations.description: S1-only VV — current VV IS the S1 impression. pv_stage null (no prior VV).
S2 VV, prior VV is S1 — direct 1-hop chain.
S3 VV, prior VV is S1 — direct 1-hop chain. S3->S1 without S2 VV intermediate.
S2->S2->S2->S1 chain. s1_pv finds S2 intermediate; s2_pv terminates at S1.
S3->S2->S2->S1 chain. s1_pv finds S2 intermediate; s2_pv terminates at S1.
S3->S3->S2->S1 chain. s1_pv finds S2 intermediate; s2_pv terminates at S1.
S3->S3->S3->S1 chain. s1_pv finds S3 intermediate; s2_pv terminates at S1.

key_constraints_validated: pv.pv_stage <= cp.vv_stage (same-stage prior VVs allowed for S3->S3 chains)
s1_pv.pv_stage <= pv.pv_stage (monotonically non-increasing stage at 2nd hop)
s2_pv.pv_stage = 1 (terminal condition — 3rd hop must be S1)
_pv_rn = 1 ORDER BY pv.prior_vv_time DESC NULLS LAST (most recent prior VV wins per Zach last-touch rule)
design_decisions_confirmed: All VV stages are anchor rows (cp_dedup has no stage filter) — Zach confirmed: include all impressions/vv
90-day lookback justified by Ray's TTL diagram: S1->S3 chain can span ~83 days
Display visits are fine as anchor rows — Ray: 'a verified visit can happen on both'
cp_ft_ad_served_id retained as comparison reference; s1_ad_served_id is the primary chain-traversal result
